content.en:
The victory of the Void Heaven True Kingdom inspired many forces in the Dao Mountain Realm, and at the beginning, it did greatly boost the morale of the Dao Mountain Realm, and for a while, it actually suppressed the forces of the Vast Sea Realm.

However, with the passage of time, those forces in the vast sea realm have sent true powerhouses one after another, and there are many supreme true ancestors participating in the battle on almost every battlefield, and even invincible true ancestors have made a move.

The other forces did not have such a background as the Void Heaven True Country, so they failed miserably one by one, and they just relied on the number of True Ancestors to forcibly support them.

What's more, a huge thunderbolt swept over the day.

The Star Horn Beast Clan, one of the five transcendent forces in the Dao Mountain Realm, took refuge in the Nine Heavens Force's Ten Thousand Domains Temple.

This news represents an alarming signal, and it also represents that the Daoshan Realm is about to usher in a great collapse.

After all, the Starhorn Clan is one of the five transcendent forces, and even the transcendent forces have taken refuge, and the other top forces have no confidence to fight at all.

As a result, one after another forces began to look for backers.

In just a few hundred years, the Daoshan Realm completely collapsed.

......

Chaos.

The Hall Master of the Forbidden Palace, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor and several other Dao Ancestors came to the outside of the territory of the Starhorn Beast Clan.

"Starlight Dao Ancestor, what do you Starhorn Beast Clan mean? Why did you take refuge in the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, our five transcendent forces had said that we would advance and retreat together, but now you have violated this agreement!"

The Forbidden Hall Lord roared angrily.

Wow!

A flash of starlight appeared, and the leader of the Starcorn clan, Starlight Dao Ancestor, appeared.

The strength of the Starlight Dao Ancestor is weaker than that of the Hall Master of the Forbidden Palace, but there are many Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Starhorn Beast Clan, so they are not afraid of the Forbidden Palace.

I saw the Starlight Dao Ancestor said: "Forbidden Hall Master, I said that I will advance and retreat with you, but what is the benefit of confronting the forces of the Vast Sea Realm? To be honest, the so-called division of the realm is meaningless, they have come to the Daoshan Realm, and they are actually a member of the Daoshan Realm. It is an immutable theorem that the strong survive and the weak are exploited. They are strong, we are weak, do you really think that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has restrained those Dao Ancestors, and those Dao Ancestors will not be able to come out? They are just unwilling to pay the price, it does not mean that they really cannot come out. They have an eightfold Heavenly True Ancestor, a Ninefold Heavenly True Ancestor, and they may even have a half-step domain ancestor! What do we have? Even the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor is only a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it is also a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor with no potential!"

The Forbidden Hall Lord and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor couldn't refute it.

What Starlight Dao Ancestor said was right, the Dao Mountain Realm was too weak, and they were completely taking advantage of the fact that their Dao Ancestor could not be born, so that they could compete with them at the level of True Ancestor.

In fact, the strength of both sides is not at all a grade.

"I know what you think, you want to use war to cultivate the strength of the True Ancestor level, and then slowly seize the inheritance and resources of the forces of the Vast Sea Realm, so that your strength can be raised to a higher level. But how long does it take for you to ascend to the realm of the Fifth Heaven, Sixth Heaven, or even the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor? Even if you are promoted to the strength of the Seventh Heaven and Eight Heavenly Dao Ancestors, once you kill too many True Ancestors of the Vast Sea Realm, when their Nine Heavenly Dao Ancestors are born, they will still kill you!"

Starlight Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"What's more, there are too many of our Starhorn Clan, we can't afford to fight! Your True Ancestor has fallen, and if you recruit geniuses to cultivate, a large number of True Ancestors will be born in the future. But our Starhorn clan is a racial force, and we can't recruit geniuses from outside, so we can only give birth to ourselves and cultivate them slowly. If we continue to fight like this, the foundation of our Starlight Beast Clan will be gone!" Starlight Dao Ancestor said helplessly.

"Starlight Dao Ancestor, what benefits did the Ten Thousand Domains Temple give you, I don't believe that you should give up just because of this and go to the Ten Thousand Domains Temple!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said angrily.

"What benefits did it give me? Hahaha, I'll show you it!"

Starlight Dao Ancestor laughed, and the aura in his body completely burst out.

At this moment, the strength of the Starlight Dao Ancestor was not the top Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

"What, you have stepped into the realm of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors?"

The Forbidden Hall Master and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor were shocked.

The bottleneck from the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor to the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor is not so easy to break, otherwise after such a long period of time in the Dao Mountain Realm, there will not be only one Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor who is the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The Starlight True Ancestor is also an extremely ancient True Ancestor, only a little later than the Forbidden Hall Master, and his qualifications are not much higher than that of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Such an ancient Dao Ancestor is almost difficult to progress, even so, there are countless opportunities and inheritances in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and many Dao Ancestors have found a way forward, but if the time is too short, they will not be able to step into the ranks of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors!

And how long has it been since the Starlight Dao Ancestor stepped into the realm of the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

"You didn't expect it, the foundation of the Nine Heavens Force is far from what you imagined. The Temple of Ten Thousand Domains gave me a treasure that could purify my bloodline, and our Starhorn Beast clan attached great importance to bloodline, originally I thought that my bloodline was already the limit, but after refining that treasure, my bloodline improved a lot, so I was able to break the shackles in one fell swoop and be promoted to the ranks of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors!" Starlight Dao Ancestor said excitedly.

Becoming a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was his dream for countless years.

And now, he has achieved it, and in the near future, he is even expected to be promoted to the realm of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, compared to the goal of the Forbidden Hall Master, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor and the others who don't know when they will be able to achieve it, his harvest is real!

"You're doing it yourself!"

After the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said this, he left.

They had come this time to seek an answer, and they didn't really want to fight the Starhorns, otherwise the cost would be too great.

And now that the Starlight Dao Ancestor has been promoted to the realm of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it is even more difficult to deal with.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also understood that he could not change the mind of the Starhorn Clan, so he could only choose to leave.

The Forbidden Hall Master and the others also left, and they did not clash with the Starhorn Clan.

With the passage of time, more and more Daoshan Realm forces have defected to those Upper Triple Heaven forces in the Vast Sea Realm, while the weaker forces are not qualified to defect to the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, so they can only choose to defect to the Middle Triple Heaven Forces and become the Lower Triple Heaven Forces under their command.

this day.

Hundreds of forces, including the Void Heaven One Vein, the God of War Tower, the Giant Axe City, the Chaos Trading House, the Mercenary Alliance, and the Immortal Gate, decided to form an alliance and open teleportation channels in the major true countries of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, completely uniting the major true kingdoms together.

This force is dominated by the Void Heaven One Line, the name of the force is the Temple of the Gods, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is the Lord of the Temple of the Gods, and there are five deputy hall masters, namely the tower master of the War God Tower, the city lord of the Giant Axe City, the president of the Chaos Trading House, the alliance leader of the Mercenary Alliance, and the gate master of the Immortal Gate.

As soon as the Temple of the Gods was established, its power was so huge, and the Dao Ancestors alone now had nearly tens of thousands.

And the many True Kingdoms under the command of the Temple of the Gods are united, and their power is also extremely powerful, enough to crush any of those Seven or Eight Heavenly Forces.

In this case, the other forces in the Daoshan Realm also joined forces and formed alliances one after another.

However, the Forbidden Hall did not join any alliance, and Daoshan did not join any alliance.

Soon after, a piece of news came that the Forbidden Hall had taken refuge in the Mitian Sect, and Daoshan had taken refuge in the Tianhai Sect.

And the Chaos Life Alliance took refuge in King Kong City, which can be called one of the Eight Heavenly Forces, and they also wanted to take refuge in the Nine Heavens Forces, but people looked down on the Chaos Life Alliance.

Because there are too few creatures under the command of the Chaos Life Alliance, after all, the Chaos Life Alliance is all some Chaos Life, but in fact, in the Divine Heaven Realm, Chaos Life is all some mounts, and they have no status.

And the Chaos Life Alliance joined King Kong City, and almost did not get too many benefits, compared to the Star Horn Clan, the treatment was too poor.

......

Terran.

Ye Tian got the latest information from the True Ancestor of the Wuji Legion, and he also sighed.

Judging from the current situation, the forces in the Daoshan Realm have completely collapsed, and alliance forces like the Temple of the Gods are only temporarily saving.

It can be seen that most of the territory of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has now fallen into the hands of those Middle Triple Heaven and Upper Triple Heaven forces, and these forces can also recruit a large number of geniuses from those countless True Kingdoms, and the development speed will definitely exceed that of alliance forces like the Temple of the Gods.

It's just that what Ye Tian didn't expect was that the Forbidden Hall and Dao Mountain would take refuge in the Nine Heavens forces so quickly.

"It seems that the Nine Heavens forces have paid a lot of price in order to win over the Forbidden Hall and Dao Mountain, and it is a treatment that the Forbidden Hall Lord and Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor cannot refuse!"

Ye Tian muttered.
